name: roboschool-crm
description: RoboSchool CRM — Professional o'quv markazi boshqaruv tizimi

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
